title: ヴィクトリアマイルの後に・新たな輝き

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
In the last stretch of the Victoria Mile, Vodka
stirs the audience by showing off her astounding
dash.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Vodka is thrilled and enthralled by her ability to
pass the other Umamusume in a flash.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Vodka realizes that this dash is the weapon she's
been looking for. She decides to continue on to
the Yasuda Kinen to further polish this skill.
